final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a gaming monitor launch, vertical format for short video cover.

Style/medium: minimalist high-end graphic design, clean editorial layout, Apple-style restraint with bold typography
Composition: rule of thirds grid, large headline occupying upper two-thirds, product specs in lower third
Subject: bold display text "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as hero headline, secondary text "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" below
Scene/backdrop: solid neutral background with subtle gradient or pure color field
Lighting/mood: clean flat lighting, no shadows, premium and sophisticated atmosphere
Color palette: high contrast, one accent color (electric blue or gaming red) against neutral dark or light base
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz", "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩"
Constraints: vertical 9:16 aspect ratio optimized for mobile; headline must dominate frame; readable at thumbnail size
Avoid: busy backgrounds, multiple fonts, decorative elements, gradients unless essential, generic gaming aesthetic with RGB overload
